lesson: A blank display on a machine that is otherwise cooling and dispensing fine, with a dead data bus to the display chip, means the display board — not the main controller.
symptoms: Machine running — cold barrel, product dispensing fine.
Can't see any settings or access service menu.
Control panel is black, but the machine still freezes and serves.
Buttons beep when pressed even though nothing appears.
Staff cannot read temperatures or menus.
Display flickered for a week and is now completely dark.
Refrigeration and the draw handle still operate normally.

tests.error-log: Can't pull the log — the panel is dark.
tests.continuity-test: 12 V rail present at the display board. The data bus into the display reads dead.

flavour: It works. You just can't see that it works.
authenticityNote: Display boards on commercial soft serve machines can fail independently of the main controller board. The machine runs perfectly blind until you replace the display.
